description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof and a spacious wooden deck that wraps around the front and side. The facade features large floor-to-ceiling glass windows and sliding doors, allowing for ample natural light and seamless indoor-outdoor living. The interior layout is open-plan, with visible kitchen, dining, and living areas, as well as separate rooms for bedrooms and bathrooms. The exterior is predominantly white with wood accents, and the deck is furnished with lounge chairs. A uniquely shaped swimming pool with a stone border is positioned adjacent to the deck, enhancing the recreational appeal. The property is enclosed by a white railing, providing safety and a defined boundary.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, expansive glass windows, a large wooden deck, and an adjacent swimming pool. The design emphasizes open-plan living and strong indoor-outdoor connections.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the deck, large glass windows, and the swimming pool in the foreground.
description_view_1: Side angle highlighting the depth of the deck, the arrangement of lounge chairs, and the open-plan interior layout.
description_view_2: Rear view with minimal windows, a back door, and the pool positioned behind the house.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the deck's extension, side windows, and the pool's proximity to the house.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped front windows
